title: Fortune's Child
rule: Adds +1 to every applicable luck bonus.

title: Fate's Favored
rule: Adds +1 to every applicable luck bonus and stacks with Fortune's Child.

title: Separate luck modifiers
rule: Fortune's Child and Fate's Favored are separate modifiers to the same qualifying luck bonus.

title: Make Your Own Luck conversion
rule: Converted luck bonuses receive both +1 modifiers.

title: Seven-Pipped Gem
rule: At 17 HD grants +10 to any d20 or +19 to Gambling/Sleight of Hand after modifiers; immediate action; post-roll/pre-result; Charisma-bonus uses.

title: Luckstone
rule: The +1 luckstone bonus becomes +3 where applicable.

title: Eyebrow Piercing of Confidence
rule: Legendary item grants +6 luck to Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma and +5 Fatal Flaws DC.

title: Invoke Deity (Luck)
rule: Maintained via Ring of Continuation; applicable luck bonuses gain both +1 modifiers.

title: Wizard spells as divine
rule: Demidius can cast any wizard spell as a divine spell.

title: Spell Perfection interpretation
rule: Does not automatically double traits, item bonuses, obedience boons, class features, or mythic abilities.

title: Custom obedience system
rule: Custom Hermes system replaces part of normal obedience access/progression.

title: Epic Leadership
rule: Campaign uses Epic Leadership and campaign follower multipliers.

title: Post-20 and mythic progression
rule: Campaign progresses beyond level 20 and uses mythic and compatible 3PP rules.

title: Combat role doctrine
rule: Prioritize certainty, anti-magic, control, enablement, and social command over weapon damage.
